client_construction.code: c, err := kafka.NewConsumer(&kafka.ConfigMap{"bootstrap.servers": brokers, "group.id": groupID, "auto.offset.reset": "earliest"}); if err != nil { return nil, err }; if err := c.Subscribe(topic, nil); err != nil { return nil, err }

primary_operations.name: ConsumeRaw
primary_operations.sdk_call: msg, err := k.consumer.ReadMessage(-1); if err != nil { return nil, err }; return msg.Value, nil

code_style_notes: ReadMessage(-1) blocks indefinitely; pass a positive timeout for poll semantics
Consumer is NOT thread-safe — use a single goroutine per consumer instance
